home.description: Building robust application with Modern Technologies & Design
home.recentProjectsDesc: Some of my latest work and featured projects

about.title: About me
content: Code has been my life since the class of form 4. I started with the C language, and that's when I realized one thing: no matter how difficult the problem, there's always a solution. I'm a very curious person, and I never give up. What really drives me isn't just writing lines of code it's taking a project, analyzing it from A to Z, and figuring out the best way to build it so that it's actually useful. I'm a Full-Stack developer, but my heart beats a little stronger for Backend and systems analysis.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
content: Never stop learning. After mastering Full stack development, I decided to dive into Networking and Security. Why? Because I want to be that complete developer who doesn't just create a nice interface, but also knows how to secure data and manage Cloud infrastructures. I want my work to be solid, fast, and most of all, protected.

goals.title: Future Goals
content: My big dream is not to grow alone. I want to create a collective of IT experts a kind of group where everyone contributes their own piece to the puzzle. We would have a shared platform where we showcase our projects and skills like living résumés. My goal is also to pass on knowledge: creating training modules to help others level up. I want technology to bring real solutions to our society, and I know that together, we'll go much further.

parcours.title: My Journey
parcours.intro: My journey reflects continuous progress, marked by learning, practice, and the completion of concrete projects.

bac.title: Scientific Baccalaureate
bac.description: Obtained GCE A-Level and orientation towards the IT field. As part of my skill development, I enrolled in professional training at Localhost Academy, where I completed a 12-month program.

laravel.title: Laravel Training (PHP)
laravel.description: I learned to structure my logic and work in a team on my first major project: Ecomarket (multi-vendor e-commerce). At the end of this training, we presented a defense and received an Excellent grade!

react.title: React & Node.js Training
react.description: Development of a platform combining e-commerce, service booking, and recruitment Received Very Good with jury congratulations (This is my favorite combination.)

flutter.title: Flutter Training
flutter.description: My favorite project: Development of a real estate mobile application with geolocation, digital wallet, and an automatic rent payment system

stage.title: Paid Internship at Master Key SARL
stage.description: My first paid professional experience, where I worked on the interface of the Master KeyPay project. This showed me the reality of the field as a Frontend developer.

today.title: University (Networks & Security)
today.description: I am preparing my future to combine development and cybersecurity. That's what will make my difference in the market.
